fixtures.name: OpenClaw Brave plugin
fixtures.why: Official Brave search package covering web search provider registration, external API/env auth metadata, manifest provider contracts, and npm artifact packaging.

fixtures.name: OpenClaw Codex harness and model provider plugin
fixtures.why: Official Codex package covering agent harness registration, model provider wiring, media understanding, migrations, inbound claims, and npm artifact packaging.

fixtures.name: OpenClaw diagnostics Prometheus exporter
fixtures.why: Official Prometheus diagnostics package covering service lifecycle, metrics HTTP routes, telemetry export, and monorepo-backed npm packaging.

fixtures.name: OpenClaw Google Meet participant plugin
fixtures.why: Official Google Meet package covering meeting tools, gateway methods, node host commands, CLI setup, and npm artifact packaging.

fixtures.name: OpenClaw diff viewer plugin
fixtures.why: Official diff viewer package covering prompt mutation, HTTP route UI surface, tool registration, manifest tool contracts, and npm artifact packaging.

fixtures.name: OpenClaw LanceDB-backed long-term memory plugin with auto-recall/capture
fixtures.why: Official LanceDB memory package covering automatic recall/capture hooks, vector-store lifecycle, service/CLI setup, tool contracts, and npm artifact packaging.

fixtures.name: OpenClaw QQ Bot channel plugin
fixtures.why: Official OpenClaw QQ Bot npm package covering command/tool registration, channel manifest metadata, media-capable messaging, and monorepo source mapping without replacing the external QQBot fixture.

fixtures.name: OpenClaw WhatsApp channel plugin
fixtures.why: Official WhatsApp channel package covering account auth, media-capable channel metadata, message policy, and npm artifact packaging from the monorepo.
